title: Deployment Workflows
content:
### Deployment Workflows

Deployment workflows take the built artifact and push it to a target environment (staging, production). GitHub Actions provides several mechanisms for safe deployments.

### Environment Protection Rules

GitHub Environments enforce rules like required reviewers or a waiting period before deployment:

```yaml
jobs:
  deploy:
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://myapp.com
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo "Deploying to production"
```

### Deployment to Azure

```yaml
- name: Deploy to Azure Web App
  uses: azure/webapps-deploy@v2
  with:
    app-name: my-app
    slot-name: staging
    publish-profile: ${{ secrets.AZURE_WEBAPP_PUBLISH_PROFILE }}
```

### Deployment to AWS (ECS)

```yaml
- name: Deploy to Amazon ECS
  uses: aws-actions/amazon-ecs-deploy-task-definition@v1
  with:
    task-definition: task-definition.json
    service: my-service
    cluster: my-cluster
    wait-for-service-stability: true
```

### Deployment to GCP (Cloud Run)

```yaml
- name: Deploy to Cloud Run
  uses: google-github-actions/deploy-cloudrun@v1
  with:
    service: my-service
    image: gcr.io/my-project/my-image:latest
```

### Docker Build and Push

```yaml
- name: Build and Push Docker Image
  uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
  with:
    context: .
    push: true
    tags: user/app:latest
```

### GitHub Pages Deployment

```yaml
- name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
  uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
```

### Full Deployment Workflow Example

```yaml
name: Deploy to Production

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Build Docker image
        run: docker build -t my-app .
      - name: Push to registry
        run: docker push my-registry/my-app:latest
      - name: Deploy
        run: echo "Deploy script goes here"
```
codeExample:
name: Deploy to Production

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://example.com
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
      - uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          push: true
          tags: ghcr.io/myorg/myapp:latest
      - run: echo "Deployed!"

quiz.question: What is the purpose of GitHub Environments in deployment workflows?
options: To enforce protection rules like required reviewers
To run jobs on specific hardware

quiz.question: Which GitHub Action is commonly used to check out repository code?
